sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71469" key="ca/ntria" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ξάν-τρια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, fem. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ξάντης,</foreign> <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> <sense id="n71469.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">putatrix, Gloss. :</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Ξάντριαι,</foreign> name of a play by Aeschylus.</sense> </entryFree>
